welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.login_prompt: Sign in and join the community.

welcome_description: Share various stories in a growing community together.
hero_description: A ready-to-use community home for boards, posts, and member discussions.
hero_footer: Set up boards, invite members, and let new activity fill this page naturally.
no_posts: Recent posts will appear here after members begin posting.
recent_posts_empty_description: Recent posts will appear here after members begin publishing discussions.
no_boards: Popular boards will appear after community activity begins.
popular_boards_empty_description: Popular boards are highlighted after boards begin receiving posts and visits.
featured_boards_description: Highlight useful spaces as the community structure takes shape.
empty_board_description: Create or enable boards, then community activity will surface recommended spaces here.
guide_rule_1: Keep discussions respectful and on topic.
guide_rule_2: Use clear titles so posts are easy to find.
guide_rule_3: Share notices and updates in the right board.
